Notice Of Mtoion And Motion For Order Compelling Production Of Documents Re; Order Of Examination Served Pursuant To Civil Subpoena
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kevin M. Sullivan, Esq., of Griffing & Sullivan, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.

PLAINTIFF ANDRE WASSERMAN"S Motion For Order Compelling Production Of Documents Re; Order Of Examination Served Pursuant To Civil Subpoena is scheduled this day. No opposition filed. The Court adopts its Tentative Ruling.

Plaintiff's motion to compel production of documents is granted. Defendant is ordered to produce documents on plaintiff via hand delivery to the offices of plaintiff's counsel no later than April 15, 2016.

All requests for sanctions are denied. Order signed in open court.
